---
title: "Regression Tables Final"
author: "Carilli"
date: "12/30/2020"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, options(scipen = 999, digits = 3), comment = NA)
library(tidyverse)
library(plm)
library(stargazer)
df <- 
  here::here("data/covid_data_final.csv") %>% 
  read_csv()
```

# Table 1 {.tabset}

## models

```{r table-1-models}
model_twoways <- 
  df %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_oneway_no_controls <- 
  df %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
  
model_oneway_with_controls <- 
  df %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

```

## table

```{r table-1, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(model_twoways, model_oneway_no_controls, model_oneway_with_controls,
  type = "html",
  align = TRUE,
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    "Social Capital Dummy",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    "Median Household Income",
    "Percent of Adults with Bachelor's Degree",
    "Percent of Adults in Fair or Poor Health",
    "Percent of Population that is Black",
    "Population Density",
    "Percent of Population in Rural Areas",
    "Percent of Population greater than 65 years old",
    "Average Temperature",
    "Republican Governor",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  title = "Regression Results",
  column.labels = c("Two-way Fixed Effects", 
                    "One-way Fixed Effects", 
                    "One-way Fixed Effects"),
  # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases",
  notes = "<em>&#42;p&lt;0.1;&#42;&#42;p&lt;0.05;&#42;&#42;&#42;p&lt;0.01</em>", notes.append = F
  # star.symbol='&#42;'
  # model.names = TRUE,
)

```

# Table 2 {.tabset}

## models

```{r table-2-models}
model_penn_state <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = scp_version_of_penn_state_index) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_putnam <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = putnam_index) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_alesina <- 
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = alesina_la_ferrara_social_capital_group) %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2),
    data = .,
    effect = "twoways",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
```

## table

```{r table-2, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(
  model_alesina,
  model_putnam,
  model_penn_state,
  type = "html",
  align = TRUE,
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    #   "Social Capital Dummy",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    #   "Median Household Income",
    #   "Percent of Adults with Bachelor's Degree",
    #   "Percent of Adults in Fair or Poor Health",
    #   "Percent of Population that is Black",
    #   "Population Density",
    #   "Percent of Population in Rural Areas",
    #   "Percent of Population greater than 65 years old",
    #   "Average Temperature",
    #   "Republican Governor",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  title = "Table 2: Alternate Social Capital Measures",
  column.labels = c(
    "Alesina La Ferrara Social Capital Group",
    "Putnam Index",
    "SCP Version of Penn State Index"
  ),
  # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases",
  notes = "Each model estimtate with two-way fixed effects."
  # model.names = TRUE,
)
```

# Table 3 {.tabset}

## models

```{r table-3-models}
model_penn_state_one_way <-
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = scp_version_of_penn_state_index) %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_putnam_one_way <-
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = putnam_index) %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )

model_alesina_one_way <-
  df %>%
  mutate(sc = alesina_la_ferrara_social_capital_group) %>%
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * sc +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
```

## table

```{r table-3, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(
  model_alesina_one_way,
  model_putnam_one_way,
  model_penn_state_one_way,
  type = "html",
  omit = c(
    "median_household_income",
    "percent_adults_with_ba",
    "percent_in_fair_or_poor_health",
    "percent_black",
    "density",
    "percent_rural",
    "percent_65",
    "average_temperature",
    "governor_political_affiliation"
  ),
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    "Social Capital Dummy",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  title = "Alternate Social Capital Measures",
  column.labels = c(
    "Alesina La Ferrara Social Capital Group",
    "Putnam Index",
    "SCP Version of Penn State Index"
  ),
  order = c(1, 3, 2, 4),
  # # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases per Million",
  # notes = "<em>&#42;p&lt;0.1;&#42;&#42;p&lt;0.05;&#42;&#42;&#42;p&lt;0.01</em>", notes.append = F
  # # model.names = TRUE,
  notes = "Each model estimtated with one-way fixed effects with controls not reported."
)
```

# Table 4 {.tabset}

## models

```{r table-4-models}
model_oneway_with_controls_pre_july_4 <- 
  df %>% 
  filter(date <= "2020-07-04") %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
  
  model_oneway_with_controls_post_july_4 <- 
  df %>% 
  filter(date > "2020-07-04") %>% 
  plm(
    cases_new ~ stringency_index_lag * state_level_dummy +
      I(stringency_index_lag ^ 2) +
      median_household_income +
      percent_adults_with_ba +
      percent_in_fair_or_poor_health +
      percent_black +
      density +
      percent_rural +
      percent_65 +
      average_temperature +
      governor_political_affiliation,
    data = .,
    effect = "time",
    index = "state",
    model = "within"
  )
```

## table

```{r table-4, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
stargazer(
  model_oneway_with_controls_pre_july_4,
  model_oneway_with_controls_post_july_4,
  type = "html",
  omit = c(
    "median_household_income",
    "percent_adults_with_ba",
    "percent_in_fair_or_poor_health",
    "percent_black",
    "density",
    "percent_rural",
    "percent_65",
    "average_temperature",
    "governor_political_affiliation"
  ),
  covariate.labels = c(
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days squared",
    "Social Capital Dummy",
    "Stringency Index Lagged 14 days * Social Capital Dummy"
  ),
  order = c(1, 3, 2, 4),
  title = "Regression Results pre and post July 4",
  column.labels = c("Mar - July 4",
                    "July 5 - Nov"),
  # style = "aer",
  dep.var.labels = "Daily New Cases per Million",
  # notes = "<em>&#42;p&lt;0.1;&#42;&#42;p&lt;0.05;&#42;&#42;&#42;p&lt;0.01</em>",
  # notes.append = F
  # star.symbol='&#42;'
  # model.names = TRUE,
  notes = "Each model estimtated with one-way fixed effects with controls not reported."
)

```
